content: Tests run via pytest (no services needed). Encode contracts not implementations. ≥1 adversarial case per file. Names must read as specs. No magic literals.

Wiring-lint tests in ui/src/lib/wiring-lint.test.ts: banned hardcoded locale strings, banned hardcoded brand colors (8 patterns), UI boundary violations. Source-grep approach enforces conventions across the entire frontend.

name: Test baselines
description: As of 2026-02-24: vitest 155/155, pytest 161/161, svelte-check 0 errors, eslint 0 errors, ruff 0 violations, mypy 0 errors (13/13 apps strict), import-linter 10/10 contracts.
